genoprobe

Getting started

  • Installation
  • Quick start

Command reference

  • targets — Define probe-design target regions
  • probes — Generate probe candidates
  • screen — Off-target screening
  • panels — Assemble final probe panels
  • index — Build a Fulgor index

genoprobe
  • Module code
  • genoprobe.paths

Source code for genoprobe.paths

"""Output path management for genoprobe."""

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path




[docs]
def resolve_output_root(output: str | Path) -> Path:
    return Path(output).expanduser().resolve()






[docs]
def targets_dir(output: Path) -> Path:
    return output / "targets"






[docs]
def probes_dir(output: Path) -> Path:
    return output / "probes"






[docs]
def screen_dir(output: Path) -> Path:
    return output / "screen"






[docs]
def panels_dir(output: Path) -> Path:
    return output / "panels"






[docs]
def index_dir(output: Path) -> Path:
    return output / "index"






[docs]
def ensure_dir(path: Path) -> Path:
    path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    return path
